message: 🌱 Add thanos: [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url` mission (#647)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-6370-query-frontend-support-flag-web-external-url",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`",
+    "description": "[Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\n### Is your proposal related to a problem?\n\nI know there was already an request before https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/364, but I don't think it was resolved completely and it may worth another try (because this is quite a stable feature"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`",
+        "description": "I believe this was fixed by https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4847. I can't reproduce this neither in Query UI, neither in the Ruler UI. Do you also see this problem in the Query UI (not on query-frontend)?\n```yaml\nhttp://localhost:10902/graph?g0.expr=(count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(avg_over_time(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D%5B5m%5D)%20%3C%200.5)%20%2F%20count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D))%20%3E%3D%200.5&g0.tab=1&g0.stacked=0&g0.range_input=1h\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I believe this was fixed by https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4847. I can't reproduce this neither in Query UI, neither in the Ruler UI. Do you also see this problem in the Query UI (not on query-frontend)?",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "http://localhost:10902/graph?g0.expr=(count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(avg_over_time(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D%5B5m%5D)%20%3C%200.5)%20%2F%20count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D))%20%3E%3D%200.5&g0.tab=1&g0.stacked=0&g0.range_input=1h",
+        "https://thanos.example.com/graph?g0.expr=(count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(avg_over_time(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D%5B5m%5D)%20%3C%200.5)%20%2F%20count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D))%20%3E%3D%200.5&g0.tab=1&g0.stacked=0&g0.range_input=1h",
+        "docker run -it -p 10902:10902 thanosio/thanos:v0.28.1 --alert.query-url=https://hello.com --query=https://localhost:9090"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
